name: Cherry Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the cherries, add their juice to the cold cranberry juice.
2. Sprinkle the gelatin over the mixture and heat until almost simmering.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the gelatin until it is thoroughly dissolved.
4. Add sugar if needed and pour into a 4-cup mold.
5. Cool the mixture, then pit the cherries if necessary.
6. Spoon the cherries into the cooled liquid when it reaches the consistency of egg whites.
7. Chill until set.
8. Serve garnished with watercress and cream cheese balls.
